sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 89

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 89:1
items.html:
(to the question) The essence of the Gevurot
Before the Gevurot come into a Zivug with the Hassadim, while they still have no discernment of GAR, they are called "illumination of the Gevurot," and not "essence." And when they attain their discernment of GAR through the Zivug with the Hassadim, they are then discerned as the essence of the Gevurot. (Item 103)
